title: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report May 09 2025
section_path: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report May 09 2025
section_path_text: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report May 09 2025
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 09/05/2025
Today, the DCE Iron Ore futures fluctuated rangebound during the day, with the most-traded contract I2509 closing at 696, down 0.57% for the day.Some merchants showed moderate enthusiasm for shipping goods. As the weekend approached, the purchase willingness of steel mills weakened somewhat, with some steel mills conducting tenders based on demand. The market transaction atmosphere was average.
